A Little Something From Your Dad

You're Invited, Emma

Come see me. It's been way too long.

✦ ✦ ✦
Charlotte → Phoenix Emma's Trip

CLT

Charlotte, NC

PHX

Phoenix, AZ

Departure Date Friday, July 24, 2026
Flexible Anytime After July 11, 2026
Return Idea About a week later — from PHX or Vegas

We can move these dates around, girl — you tell me what works.

WHO

The First W

Who's Invited

Just you, Emma. Seventeen years old and heading straight into "womanhood extraordinaire" — that's really how I think of you. No one else needs a ticket for this one, it's just for you and me.

And while you're here, you'll get to meet the Tucson side too — my friends and family who've heard about you for years and finally get to meet the real thing.

"Who's Emma best loved by? Her mom and her dad. Full stop."
WHAT

The Second W

What This Is

This is a trip for my beautiful daughter to come see her father — hopefully for a whole week. It's been over a year, and yeah, that's on me. I know it.

The plan: one full day and night showing you around Tucson, then we head to Vegas, where your grandma's timeshare has us covered for the week. I'll rent a car and drive us out. You might even fly home straight from Vegas instead — whatever's easier and cheaper.

"She wants to see me because she's awesome. And I want to see her — it's been way too long."
WHEN

The Third W

When

Anytime after July 11th works on my end. I'm looking hard at July 24th through the 31st, with a one-way ticket to start — that way we've got room to shift your return around depending on whether you fly out of Phoenix or Vegas.

Exactly when you land just depends on how long you want to stay in Tucson before we roll out to Vegas. Your call, kiddo.

WHERE

The Fourth W

Where

You'll stay with me at my place on Pantano Road here in Tucson, then it's off to Vegas for the week at Grandma's timeshare. Mom's back in Carolina, and I know Vegas is a big change of scenery from home.

Meals will be easy — takeout, or you cooking, or me cooking (we'll see who's braver). And the real "where" that matters most: just being in the same room as each other again.

WHY

The Fifth W

Why

Because that's unconditional father-daughter love, and honestly, it doesn't get better than that. You're coming because you love your dad and haven't seen where I live. I want to see you because you're successful at everything, always — and I've missed watching that up close.

We're just in different states right now. That's the way the cookie crumbles. But I love crumbles — and I love you more.

"Why am I happy? Because my daughter's successful at all times. That's it. That's the whole answer."
US, THROUGH THE YEARS

From go-karts to graduation gowns — I've never stopped being proud of you.

So... Do These Dates Work?

No pressure, no strings — just your dad hoping you'll say yes. Tell me what works for you and we'll lock it in together.

Yes, Let's Do This! ✦

"That's unconditional father, daughter, love. Can't get better than that."

— Love, Dad

Made with love, for Emma. See you soon, kiddo.
